description: End-to-end pipeline scenarios — each item bundles obligations, matched policies, expected gap classification, and expected risk severity. Used by evals.end_to_end.scenarios for aggregate gap precision/recall/F1 and severity accuracy.

scenarios.title: KYC: Customer Identification Programme fully compliant

obligations.obligation_text: Banks shall put in place a Customer Identification Procedure (CIP) covering name, address, and government-issued ID at account opening.

matched_policies.text: The Bank maintains a Customer Identification Programme (CIP) requiring collection of customer name, address, date of birth, and a government-issued photo ID for all individual accounts prior to account opening.

scenarios.title: KYC: Enhanced due diligence for PEPs is missing

obligations.obligation_text: Enhanced Due Diligence shall be performed for Politically Exposed Persons (PEPs).

matched_policies.text: Customers are categorised as Low, Medium, or High risk at onboarding using a risk scoring model.

scenarios.title: AML: PMLA 10-year record retention missing — critical

obligations.obligation_text: All transaction records shall be maintained for 10 years from cessation under PMLA.

scenarios.title: AML: Wire transfer monitoring missing despite STR policy

obligations.obligation_text: Banks shall monitor wire transfers for originator and beneficiary information completeness.

matched_policies.text: The Bank files STRs with FIU-IND within 7 days of detection.

scenarios.title: Cyber: 6-hour RBI incident reporting missing — critical

obligations.obligation_text: Cyber security incidents shall be reported to RBI within 6 hours of detection.
Banks shall compensate customers for unauthorized electronic transactions within 10 working days.

scenarios.title: KYC: high-risk review cadence partially aligned

obligations.obligation_text: Risk categorisation for HIGH-risk customers shall be reviewed at least once every six months.

matched_policies.text: Risk category is reviewed annually for Medium risk and bi-annually for Low risk customers.

obligations.obligation_text: Insurer solvency ratio shall be maintained as prescribed by IRDAI.
Suspicious Transaction Reports shall be filed with FIU-IND within 7 days of detection.

matched_policies.text: The Bank files Suspicious Transaction Reports (STRs) with FIU-IND within 7 days of detection.

obligations.obligation_text: Risk categorisation for HIGH-risk customers shall be reviewed at least once every six months.

matched_policies.text: Risk category is reviewed annually for Medium risk and bi-annually for Low risk customers.

obligations.obligation_text: All transaction records shall be maintained for 10 years from cessation under PMLA.
Banks shall establish a Whistleblower / Vigil Mechanism.
